zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre於1220年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆韓格斯吉-桑特時，她的父親Aubert De Hangest II32歲，母親Elisabeth De Châtillon21歲。她於1228年與Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o洛也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1268年享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre was born in 1220, in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Aubert De Hangest II, was 32 and her mother, Elisabeth De Châtillon, was 21. She married Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I in 1228, in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1268, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre est née en 1220, à Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Aubert De Hangest II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth De Châtillon, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I en 1228, à Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1268, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre 1220 in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aubert De Hangest II 32 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth De Châtillon 21. Sie hat 1228 in Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1268 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre è nata il nel 1220 nel Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Aubert De Hangest II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth De Châtillon, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I nel 1228, nel Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1268, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerreが1220年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメハンジェスト-エン-サンテアで生まれた時，父Aubert De Hangest IIは32歳，母Elisabeth De Châtillonは21歳であった。1228年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンロイでJean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1268年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre(이)가 1220년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 핸그스트--산티르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aubert De Hangest II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth De Châtillon(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1228년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 로예에서 Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre nasceu em 1220, em Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Aubert De Hangest II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth De Châtillon, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I em 1228, em Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1268, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre родилась в 1220 г. в местности хангест-ен-сантирр, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Aubert De Hangest II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth De Châtillon, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I в 1228 г. в местности рои, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1268 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Adele de Hangest-en-Santerre nació en 1220, en Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Aubert De Hangest II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elisabeth De Châtillon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jean I de Roye, de Guerbigny, Becquigny, Monchy I en 1228, en Roye, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1268, a la edad de 48 años.
